rows.description: Computus Dno Rectoris J. C. Jones
rows.notes: Description taken from 'gemini-flash' as it precisely matches the visible text ('Dno' without a dot, 'J. C. Jones'). The text is clear on the page.
rows.section_header: Computus Dno Rectoris J. C. Jones

rows.notes: Full consensus on description, type, and absence of amounts. The text is clearly legible.
Description taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms 'revolutum' and the ellipsis (dots) are present, unlike 'gpt-5-mini' which read 'revolutionum' and omitted the dots.
Description taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms 'Arrearagia' and the trailing period, unlike 'gpt-5-mini' which read 'Arrearages'.
Description taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection clearly shows 'fixed.' (with a period), not '&c.' as read by 'gpt-5-mini'.
Amounts are consensual and clearly legible. Description for the place name 'Giddington' is from 'gemini-flash', visually confirmed as having a 'G' not an 'H' as 'gpt-5-mini' suggested (Hidlington).
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Giddington rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Giddington rectory, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and clearly legible. Description is a merge: 'Capons' from 'gemini-flash' and 'Brawne' from 'gpt-5-mini'. Visual inspection confirms 'Capons' (not 'Caprons') and 'Brawne' (not 'Brown'). 'gpt-5-mini' provided good notes on the ambiguity of names due to flourishes.
rows.english_description: Capons and brawn due from Giddington rectory for the year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Capons and brawn from Giddington rectory for the year, amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts for shillings and pence are consensual and clear. Pounds amount of 0 and description 'Sad Lane - Norris 1 yr.' (with trailing period) taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms the initial 'S' for 'Sad' (not 'Lad'), and crucially, the pounds column is blank, correctly interpreted as 0 by 'gemini-flash'. 'gpt-5-mini' erroneously read '9' in the empty pounds column.
rows.english_description: Annual rent for Sad Lane paid by Norris.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for Sad Lane paid by Norris, amounting to £0 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Pounds and pence are consensual and clear. Shillings amount of 3 and description 'Pickford 1 yr.' (with trailing period) taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection clearly shows the shillings digit as '3', not '13' as read by 'gpt-5-mini'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent paid by Pickford, amounting to £1 3s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and clearly legible. Description 'Little Dew - Beck's 1 yr.' (with apostrophe and trailing period) taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms the apostrophe in 'Beck's' and the period after 'yr.'.
rows.english_description: Annual rent for Little Dew paid by Beck.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for Little Dew paid by Beck, amounting to £1 6s 1d.

rows.notes: Description taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms 'Redeemed Land &' is clearly visible. The subsequent word 'Tax' is extremely faint and barely legible; prioritizing clearer visible text over inferred or very faded words.

Amounts are consensual and clearly legible. Description 'Giddington Rectory 1 yr.' (with trailing period) taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection again confirms 'Giddington' (not 'Hildington') and the period.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Giddington rectory (redeemed land).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Giddington rectory (redeemed land), amounting to £22 5s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and clearly legible. Description 'Long Wittenham Do. 1 yr.' (with trailing period) taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms 'Wittenham' (without an 'h') and the period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Long Wittenham, amounting to £28 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and clearly legible. Description 'Jamton Do. 1 yr.' (with trailing period) taken from 'gemini-flash'. Visual inspection confirms the initial letter is a 'J' (not 'G') and the period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Jamton, amounting to £14 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds and shillings are consensual and clear. Pence amount of 7 taken from 'gpt-5-mini'. Visual inspection clearly shows the pence digit as '7', not '4' as read by 'gemini-flash'. 'gpt-5-mini' also correctly noted that this sum matches its own preceding entries, demonstrating good internal consistency for its extraction.
